creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Accounts that were created for submitters of bugs during the import from GNATS to bugzilla all have their user name set to their email address. See bug 191710 for example, but there are many. As a result, there's no way that I can find to find the actual name of the person who submitted the bug in that particular case and in many others as well.

To resolve this, a custom script would have to be written which finds the usernames from the GNATS data and updates the Bugzilla db.
